name: Neahwa Park
description: Neahwa Park is a place to play pickleball in Oneonta, NY. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.
open_play_schedule: Team Reach Group Code: PB13820. You can find players here from 8am-10am throughout the week, but don’t hesitate to join the Team Reach Group Chat and find others to play with outside those times

name: Oneonta Family YMCA
description: Oneonta Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Oneonta, NY. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Suny Oneonta
description: Located in the Chase Gymnasium on SUNY Oneonta’s campus
